Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Why perpetuate the nonsense activities of the past?

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-10-11 · 11 answers
This question is specifically for Janmastami prabhu in West Virginia. Janmastami prabhu, please tell me, what is it that you are trying to accomplish by eternalizing the nonsense activities and behaviors of the former leaders of ISKCON especially in NV? A bright man such as yourself, could surely utilize his spiritual assets in a positive manner. Your present negative approach is salty and distasteful. Furthermore, it is not beneficial to anyone. Including yourself! Its actually a detriment to everyone who hears it or reads it. What is the use? You claim constructive criticism, but it is self evident that this is certainly not the case. You obviously have selfish motives regarding this matter. This is not good! You are committing spiritual suicide. This activity will not help you or anyone else advance in their spiritual life. I can certainly understand your anger and frustration in reference to those nonsense activities of the past you consistantly speak of. However, get over it! It doesnt matter anymore. Their gone now. At least for the most part anyway. Still, what is the use of perpetuating it??? In all honesty, can you say that your current writing activity is beneficial to anyone, including your own self? I think not. You have become so engrossed in these matters that it has distorted your vision. Therefore, you have lost sight of what the real mission is. If you continue with this nonsense, you will be discarded. A godbrother like you, who is so well versed should seriously think about the continuation of these activities. You are so into this nonsense, you have actually become exactly like those you criticize. You are cheating. You are taking the knowkedge that KRSNA has given you and you are misusing it. You have already made your points valid or invalid quite clear. Enough is enough. Lets move on shall we.This is the highest form of cheating Janmastami prabhu, and you know it. Use what Krsna has given you to help others. You posses much knowledge regarding Krsna consciousness, why waste it in this way? Please tell me, WHY??? Your servant,
Priya
user [153] · 2007-10-11
is this the "priya" from philadelphia?
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Not a relavent question. But, yes.
user [191] · 2007-10-11
So, are you engaged in any other activity beside this?
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Does this exclude me from receiving a response from you? :) :) To be honest, I think everyone would like an answer to this question. Why???
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Hari bol Jan, give up this nonsense. You look very foolish to still be doing this after all these years. You have evidently not advanced much due to your nonsense behavior. Instead you choose to remain an Aparadhi. Nothing more. Even still, I wish you well in you spiritual endeavors. That is provided you have any left. Sorry to see it turned out this way for you. Most unfortunate. What a waste. Hare Krsna!
user [192] · 2007-10-11
I think Janmastami is upset because Kirtanandas two lieutenants, Kuladri and Radanatha,are still holding prominemt postions in Iskcon,both where aware
of the murder that was about to take place, but did nothingto stop it.
user [191] · 2007-10-11
I am not avoiding your response. I have some personal business to attend to. So, when I return, I will certainly respond. YS, Priya
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Hariharibol, I know its you.:):)
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Theres a little more to it than that, which I will not comment on. In any event, I too am somewhat still upset that the lieutenants as you say, are still in so-called prominent positions. In reality, they are in quite the precarious position. For they will have to suffer for the results of their activity. According to my understanding, a special hellish place had to be created specifically for these types of individuals. Therefore, I am not bothered by it so much anymore. It still disturbs me from time to time, but I dont dwell on it. Its counter productive to my KC. Krsna will take care of them accordingly I assure you. Knowing this is comfort enough for me. And well just leave it at that. YS, Priya Thanks for the input.
user [191] · 2007-10-11
Have you seen Japa prabhu at all since we last spoke? Whats going on with you Bubba. My daughter Visnu-Priya still remembers you. Its amazing. Our children are quite amazing. Due to Krsnas mercy, they have grown up nicely. Very Krsna conscious. Prabhupadas special mercy! They are true lovers of Srila Prabhupada and Krsna. Remember Sita used to say,"Thank God we have Krsna". :)Having grown up in an Italian catholic environment, they are always thanking god for something or other.(material). Its hilarious. Is it not? Thank God we have Krsna. Too funny. In any event, regardless of your spiritual dilemma, I truly wish you well my old friend. All glories to Srila Prabhupada.
user [192] · 2007-10-13
Sorry Priya,I am not janmastami das.

What do you think about the nonsense activities of the present?
